title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to donate to the Department of Education (DepEd) represented by the School Division Superintendednt Editha M. Atendido 4,975.7 square meters of the land located in Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna purchased and owned by the Municipal Government of Los Baños and presently being utilized by the Los Baños Integrated School (LBIS) and ratifying the same the
